title: Referencing points with variables
description:
Referencing points with variables

Referencing points with variables

Use the letter P followed by a variable name within parentheses that represents the point number you are referencing.

For I = 0 To 10

		  Go P(i)

		Next i

Note: Although you can define points at the Command window for test purposes, it is recommended that all points be defined in a program, point editor, or with the Robot Manager Jog and Teach page.  Points defined at the Command window will be cleared from memory when you build a project or run a program unless you execute SavePoints.
examples:
For I = 0 To 10
		  Go P(i)
		Next i
